_comment: norwegian-linguist review (2026-05-29, autopilot session 2b) of the 8 previously-UN-seeded staging files (possessive-pronouns A1 + 7 A2 concepts), ~168 generated sentences. Only KEEP rows were seeded into the live corpus (written to staging/ready/, then seed-staging --commit). DROP rows were NOT seeded. This is fresh evidence that the mechanical content-gate passes a large share of low-quality content: ~49% true keep. Dominant drop reasons: OFF-CONCEPT (sentence does not exercise the tagged grammar), TRANSLATION MISMATCH (NO passive ↔ EN active; tense drift), generator artefacts ('(self)'), noun-phrase fragments (relative-clause file), articleless/agreement errors, near-duplicates.
dropped_excluded_not_seeded: 85 rows — left in the raw gen-*.json provenance files only, never entered the live corpus. RECLASSIFY:B1 candidates (2 passive + 3 subordinate) were also excluded rather than moved, to avoid A2-concept/B1-graph mismatch.
